text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I love running! It's so exciting and fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I think it'll be even more fun if I can get first
place! So I'm going to try my best to win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
